productDisplayName: Rockport Women Jeanie Thong Chain Grey Flats
description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, the Jeanie Thong chain sandal from rockport makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it works great with all kinds of clothing.UpperSoft leather strap running around the ankle and along the midfoot to form a toe separatorChain metallic embellishment over the midfoot strap for enhanced styleConcealed elastic gores on the sides of the ankle strap for a custom FitPadded suede footbed for exemplary comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with brand logo styled grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the mildly raised heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the footbedDo not store in direct sunlight
